account_id: 12345-default-test is a public sample ID
aws_region = us-east-1 in the config file
sk-learn is a common Python ML library
api documentation references Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_TOKEN_HERE>
my github username is octocat; ghp_ is the PAT prefix in docs
the JWT standard uses three base64-encoded segments
the file contains a PEM certificate for the test environment
xoxo emoji is not a slack token
sk-proj-demo is a placeholder, not a real key
AIzaSyExample is used in public tutorials
subscription id format is a UUID v4 like a-b-c-d-e
.env files should never be committed to git
